content.body:
RDDs, KB proposals, migration maps, and convention templates are
legacy design documents. Their decisions are captured in KB docs.
Kept locally for the owner to review at their convenience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
